title: espeletia murilloi
intro: Espeletia murilloi, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Espeletia murilloi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and stems are commonly used to make a medicinal infusion.
